summary: Obi Toppin — No strong signal — Top market by sample: Points 45.5% (11 GP)

methodology.baseline: All games for this player × market, across all books and lines.
methodology.current_line: Most common historical line (highest GP) across all sportsbooks.
methodology.book_context: Hit rate per sportsbook × line combination.
methodology.supporting_context: Venue, pace tier, rest days, season phase splits at the most common historical line.
methodology.display_floor: 10 GP minimum. Feature tier: 30+ GP. Hero: 65%+ or 35%- over rate.
